text: Every morning, I wake up at six thirty. I wash my face, brush my teeth, and then eat breakfast. After that, I walk to school with my sister.
tips: wake up 兩個字連音唸成 wa-kup
brush my teeth 的 th 是無聲子音
then 的 th 是有聲子音，不要和 then 混淆
explanation: 日常作息描述，使用現在簡單式。and then 表示順序，after that 表示接下來。

text: The weather is sunny and warm today. Let's go to the beach and swim in the ocean. Don't forget to bring your sunscreen!
tips: sunny 的 /sʌni/，/ʌ/ 嘴型放鬆
ocean 的 /oʊʃən/，/ʃ/ 是「噓」音
sunscreen 的 /skr/ 三個子音連發，不要加母音
explanation: 天氣描述轉為活動提議。Let's = Let us 縮讀。Don't forget to + 動詞 = 別忘了做某事。

text: My best friend Anna is very kind and funny. She always helps me when I have problems. We like to study together at the library.
tips: best 和 friend 的 /st/ 和 /fr/ 要接好，st 到 fr 不要頓
always 的 /ɔːlweɪz/，l 後接 w，舌頭要先翹再嘟嘴
together 的 th 是有聲子音，/təˈɡɛðər/
explanation: 人物描述，使用 be 動詞加形容詞。always 是頻率副詞，放在一般動詞前。

text: Welcome to our restaurant. May I take your order? For the main dish, we have grilled fish, fried chicken, and pasta. What would you like to try?
tips: restaurant 只有兩個音節 RES-tau-rant，不要唸成三個
grilled 的 /ɡr/ 要一起出氣，l 舌尖到上齒齦
fried 的 /fraɪd/，r 先捲舌再接 f
explanation: 餐廳服務生用語。May I take your order? 是禮貌的點餐起頭句。What would you like... 是委婉詢問。

text: I have a headache and a sore throat. I think I need to see a doctor. Can you tell me where the nearest clinic is?
tips: headache 的 h 和 a 之間是 /ɛ/ 短音，不是長音
sore throat 的 th 是無聲子音，throat 的 r 要捲
clinic 兩個音節 CLI-nic，重音在第一節
explanation: 身體不適與尋求協助。have a headache/sore throat。need to + 動詞表示需要。

text: Last weekend, my family went to the night market. We ate stinky tofu and bubble tea. It was a lot of fun!
tips: last weekend 的 /læst/，æ 是張大嘴的 a
night market 的 /naɪt/ 雙母音 aɪ 要發完整
stinky 的 /stɪŋki/，注意 ŋ 後鼻音接 k
explanation: 過去式描述週末活動。went 是 go 的過去式，ate 是 eat 的過去式。a lot of fun = 非常好玩。

text: Excuse me, how can I get to Taipei Main Station? You can take the MRT red line. Get off at the third stop, and you will see the exit on your left.
tips: Excuse me 的 /ɪksˈkjuːz/，c 發 /k/，不是 /s/
third 的 th 是無聲子音 /θɜːrd/，舌尖放在齒間送氣
exit 的 /ˈɛksɪt/，x 發 /ks/，重音在第一音節
explanation: 問路與交通指引。get to + 地點 = 到達。take the MRT = 搭捷運。Get off = 下車。

text: I really enjoy listening to music. My favorite singer is Taylor Swift. I often listen to her songs before I go to sleep.
tips: enjoy 的 /ɪnˈdʒɔɪ/，第二音節重音，/dʒ/ 像中文「這」
favorite 注意 r 要捲，/ˈfeɪvərɪt/
often 的 t 可發可不發，建議發出來 /ˈɔːftən/
explanation: 興趣表達。enjoy + V-ing。listen to + 對象。go to sleep = 入睡。

text: I am looking for a birthday gift for my mother. Do you have any ideas? She likes reading, so maybe a book would be nice.
tips: looking for 的 /ˈlʊkɪŋ/，oo 發短 /ʊ/ 不是長 /uː/
birthday 的 th 是無聲子音 /bɜːrθdeɪ/
ideas 的 /aɪˈdiːəz/，重音在第二節，結尾 /z/
explanation: 購物情境。look for = 尋找。gift for + 人。so 是連接詞，表示因果關係。maybe = 也許。

text: My favorite subject is history because I like to learn about the past. Our teacher tells us many interesting stories. History class is never boring.
tips: history 第一個音節重音 HIS-to-ry，/ˈhɪstəri/
because 的 /bɪˈkɔːz/，au 發 /ɔː/ 不是 /aʊ/
interesting 四個音節 IN-ter-est-ing，不要吃掉中間的 er
explanation: 科目喜好說明。because 引導原因。learn about = 學習關於。never boring = 一點也不無聊。

text: Chinese New Year is the most important holiday in Taiwan. Families get together and have a big dinner. Children receive red envelopes with money inside.
tips: Chinese 的 /tʃaɪˈniːz/，Ch 發 /tʃ/，nese 重音在最後
important 的 /ɪmˈpɔːrtənt/，/p/ 後有 /ɔːr/ 要捲舌
envelopes 的 EN-ve-lopes，重音在第一音節
explanation: 節日文化描述。the most important = 最重要的。get together = 團聚。red envelopes = 紅包。

text: Playing sports is good for your health. I play basketball every Friday after school. It helps me relax and make new friends.
tips: sports 的 /spɔːrts/，o 發 /ɔː/，結尾 /ts/
health 的 th 是無聲子音 /hɛlθ/，注意 l 到 θ 的轉換
relax 重音在第二節 re-LAX，/rɪˈlæks/
explanation: 運動好處。Playing sports 動名詞當主詞。good for + 名詞。help + 人 + 動詞。

text: Next summer, I will visit Japan with my family. We plan to go to Tokyo and Kyoto. I want to try sushi and see the cherry blossoms.
tips: visit 的 /ˈvɪzɪt/，v 上齒咬下唇，不是 b
Tokyo 只有兩個音節 TO-kyo，kyo 唸成 kjəʊ
blossoms 的 /ˈblɑːsəmz/，bl 連發，結尾 mz
explanation: 未來計畫。will + 動詞 = 將要做。plan to + 動詞。try = 嘗試。cherry blossoms = 櫻花。

text: I use my phone to take photos and send messages. I also like to watch videos on the Internet. However, my parents tell me not to use it too much.
tips: photos 的 /ˈfoʊtoʊz/，ph 發 /f/，不要唸成 p
messages 兩個音節 MES-sages，/ˈmɛsɪdʒɪz/
however 的 /haʊˈɛvər/，重音在第二節 ev
explanation: 手機使用習慣。use + 東西 + to + 動詞。also 放在動詞前面。However 是轉折詞。

text: I have a cute little cat named Momo. She has white fur and big green eyes. Every night, she sleeps on my bed and keeps me warm.
tips: cute 的 /kjuːt/，/juː/ 是 u 的長音，不要只唸 u
fur 的 /fɜːr/，f 後接 ɜːr 要捲舌
keeps 的 /kiːps/，ee 長音 iː，p 後接 s
explanation: 寵物描述。named + 名字。has + 特徵。keep me warm = 讓我保持溫暖。

text: My mother makes the best dumplings in the world. She puts pork, cabbage, and mushrooms inside. I can eat more than ten at one meal!
tips: dumplings 的 /ˈdʌmplɪŋz/，/ʌ/ 嘴型放鬆，/pl/ 連發
cabbage 兩個音節 CAB-bage，重音第一節，/ˈkæbɪdʒ/
mushrooms 的 /ˈmʌʃruːmz/，sh 發 /ʃ/，r 要捲
explanation: 食物描述。makes the best = 做得最好。put A, B, and C inside。more than ten = 超過十個。

text: Autumn is my favorite season. The leaves turn yellow and red, and the weather becomes cool. I love walking in the park and hearing the sound of leaves under my feet.
tips: autumn 的 /ˈɔːtəm/，au 發 /ɔː/，n 前面的 m 要閉嘴
leaves 的 /liːvz/，v 上齒咬下唇，結尾 /vz/
becomes 的 /bɪˈkʌmz/，重音第二節，/ʌ/ 放鬆嘴型
explanation: 季節描述。turn + 顏色 = 變成某色。become + 形容詞 = 變得。love + V-ing。

text: I am having a birthday party this Saturday. Would you like to come? It starts at two o'clock in the afternoon. There will be games, cake, and lots of fun!
tips: party 的 /ˈpɑːrti/，ar 發 /ɑːr/，美式要捲舌
Saturday 的 /ˈsætərdeɪ/，第一個 t 常唸成輕微 d（美式）
afternoon 重音在第一和第三節 AF-ter-NOON
explanation: 派對邀請。I am having a party = 我要辦派對（進行式表未來）。Would you like to come? 禮貌詢問。lots of = 很多。

text: Learning English is not easy, but I try my best. I practice speaking every day. Watching English movies also helps me a lot.
tips: learning 的 /ˈlɜːrnɪŋ/，l 舌尖到上齒齦，r 要捲
practice 的 /ˈpræktɪs/，pr 連發，ac 發 /æk/
movies 的 /ˈmuːviz/，v 上齒咬下唇，不是 w
explanation: 學習心得。Learning English 動名詞當主詞。try my best = 盡力。help + 人 + a lot。

text: There is a small park near my house. Many people go there to walk their dogs. Sometimes, I go there to read a book under the big tree.
tips: small 的 /smɔːl/，s 和 m 要連在一起不要斷
people 兩個音節 PEO-ple，/ˈpiːpəl/，第二節母音弱化
sometimes /ˈsʌmtaɪmz/，重音第一節，t 後接 aɪmz
explanation: 社區環境描述。There is + 單數名詞 + 地方。go there to + 動詞 = 去那裡做某事。near = 在附近。

text: I usually ride my bike to school. It takes about fifteen minutes. Riding a bike is good exercise and it also saves money.
tips: usually 的 /ˈjuːʒuəli/，s 發 /ʒ/ 像「日」
fifteen 的 th 是無聲子音 /ˌfɪfˈtiːn/，重音在 teen
exercise 三個音節 EX-er-cise，/ˈɛksərsaɪz/，重音第一節
explanation: 交通方式。ride a bike = 騎腳踏車。take + 時間 = 花費時間。save money = 省錢。

text: We should take care of our Earth. Please remember to turn off the lights when you leave a room. Bring your own bag when you go shopping.
tips: should 的 /ʃʊd/，sh 發 /ʃ/，oul 發 /ʊ/ 短音
Earth 的 /ɜːrθ/，開頭 /ɜːr/ 要捲舌，結尾 th 無聲
leave 的 /liːv/，l 後接 ee 長音，v 上齒咬下唇
explanation: 環保呼籲。take care of = 照顧。remember to + 動詞。turn off = 關掉。your own = 你自己的。

text: Yesterday I watched a great movie with my classmates. The story was about a brave girl who saved her village. I almost cried at the end!
tips: watched 的結尾是 /tʃt/，ch + ed 發 /t/，非常短的送氣
brave 的 /breɪv/，br 連發，v 上齒咬下唇
almost 的 /ˈɔːlmoʊst/，l 舌尖到上齒齦，st 結尾
explanation: 電影心得（過去式）。watched、was、saved、cried 都是過去式。almost = 幾乎。at the end = 在結尾。

text: When I grow up, I want to be a teacher. I want to help children learn new things. My parents say it is a great dream. I will study hard for it.
tips: grow 的 /ɡroʊ/，/oʊ/ 雙母音從 o 滑到 ʊ
children 兩個音節 CHIL-dren，/ˈtʃɪldrən/，重音第一節
dream 的 /driːm/，dr 連發後接 ea 長音
explanation: 未來夢想。when + 現在式 = 當…的時候（表未來）。grow up = 長大。study hard = 努力讀書。

text: I went to the doctor yesterday because I had a fever. The doctor told me to drink more water and get some rest. I feel much better today.
tips: doctor 的 /ˈdɑːktər/，c 發 /k/，不是 /s/
fever 的 /ˈfiːvər/，f 後接 ee 長音，v 上齒咬下唇
rest 的 /rɛst/，e 短音 /ɛ/，不要唸成 a
explanation: 看醫生（過去式）。went/had/told 是過去式。told me to = 叫我做。get some rest = 休息。much better = 好多了。
